bundle.longDescription: Seamlessly integrate speech-to-text transcriptions anywhere on your desktop. Powered by OpenAI's Whisper API.
bundle.shortDescription: Press shortcut → speak → get text. Free and open source ❤️

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' blob: data: asset: http://asset.localhost https:; frame-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https: http: ws: wss: data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob: http://localhost:1420; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' blob: data: asset: http://asset.localhost https:; frame-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420 https: http: ws: wss: data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
